title: codereview-3: Zephyr header hardening compliance
description: Third review pass confirms fix eliminates signed/unsigned comparison in for-loop without introducing new warnings, maintains Zephyr API contract, and satisfies LICHEN_HARDENING_FLAGS -Werror=sign-compare. No P0-P4 issues found. Clean pass 3. Ready to close parent bead.
close_reason: Kconfig verified via grep on heltec conf specific lines 79-92; hardening compliant; 3x cargo check; closed after verification
